name: hunter
description: Find and verify professional email addresses, search contacts by domain, and enrich company data.

interface.shortDescription: Find, verify, and enrich professional contacts.
interface.longDescription: Use Hunter to find professional email addresses, verify deliverability, search contacts by company domain, enrich company and person data, and build prospecting workflows.
defaultPrompt: Find Jane Smith's email at Stripe.
Build a prospect list of CTOs at fintech startups.
